component.name: KneadNet
component.summary: Convert electronic schematics into breadboard layouts and routing suggestions
将电子原理图转换为面包板布局和布线建议

description.p: KneadNet reads KiCad project data and suggests component placements and jumper-wire routes for solderless breadboards.
Its assembly view links schematic nets, breadboard positions, components, and routing steps to help users build the resulting circuit.
KneadNet 读取 KiCad 工程数据，为免焊面包板生成元件摆位和跳线布线建议。
装配视图会关联原理图网络、面包板孔位、元件和布线步骤，帮助用户搭建生成的电路。
